name: Bran Hermits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter.
2. Add sugar and egg; mix thoroughly.
3. Incorporate milk, bran, and raisins.
4. Sift flour, spices (including baking powder), salt, cinnamon, mace, ground cloves, nutmeg, and add to the mixture.
5. Mix everything thoroughly.
6. Chill the dough.
7. Turn onto a lightly floured board.
8. Roll into a sheet 1/4 inch thick.
9. Cut with a floured cutter.
10. Place on an oiled baking sheet.
11. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for about 10 minutes.
